title: rastrophyllum apiifolium
intro: Rastrophyllum apiifolium, a species of flowering plant native to Australia, is a member of the Rutaceae family and is commonly known as the lemon-scented gum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rastrophyllum apiifolium include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe skin irritations, and support overall well-being.
